hero.name: Yevhen
hero.description: Full-stack developer focused on Python, Django, and REST APIs. I write clean, secure, and scalable code, and enjoy turning ideas into working software. When I'm not coding, I'm probably breaking and fixing my Linux config.

achievements.1: Developed a Django-based web application with a REST API using Django REST Framework.
achievements.2: Implemented frontend with TypeScript, HTML, and SCSS, bundled using Webpack.
achievements.3: Wrote comprehensive tests for all API endpoints using PyTest, ensuring reliability and coverage.
achievements.4: Deployed and tested the application on a virtual machine, assessing security and performance.
achievements.5: Configured development and testing environments for consistent workflow.

achievements.1: Developed RESTful APIs for products, including CRUD operations, search, sorting, filtering, and pagination.
achievements.2: Implemented user authentication and management (registration, login, logout, profiles) using JWT and Google Login.
achievements.4: Automated tasks using custom Bash and Python scripts.
achievements.5: Designed and optimized MySQL database structures.

achievements.1: Applied web application security techniques under the guidance of senior officers, testing for vulnerabilities.
achievements.2: Collaborated with a mentor to explore modern web security approaches for academic research.
achievements.3: Developed a Django-based web application for my diploma project and assessed it for vulnerabilities using standard security tools.
achievements.4: Observed field operations and detentions, gaining practical exposure to law enforcement practices.

1.title: Personal Portfolio Website
1.description: Personal website built with HTML, SCSS, and TypeScript.

2.title: Recipe App
2.description: Web application for creating and managing recipes. Built with Django and Django REST Framework.

3.title: Django Polls App
3.description: Web application for creating and voting in polls. User-friendly interface and part of my diploma work.

4.title: Image Sorter
4.description: Terminal-based image management tool using Python and curses. Sort, move, rename, and delete images with keyboard shortcuts.

5.title: Tkinter Password Generator
5.description: Simple Tkinter application to generate secure passwords through a GUI.
